## Summary of Changes

<!-- Mandatory. Describe what changed, why it changed, and the scope of affected components. -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that resolves a confirmed defect)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds capability)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that modifies existing contracts or behavior)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor (no functional change)

## Related Issues

Fixes #<!-- issue number -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I have added tests for the new feature or bug fix.
- [ ] I have updated the documentation.
- [ ] This PR does not introduce breaking changes (or I have explained them).
- [ ] The code follows project naming conventions and PSR standards.

## Testing Evidence

Describe test commands executed and their results. Include coverage notes for new code paths.

```
# Example: vendor/bin/phpunit --filter RelevantTest
```

## Breaking Changes

If applicable, document migration steps, deprecated APIs, and version constraints. Leave blank if none.
